# Test VEX generation with golden file comparison
# Run: VENS_UPDATE_SCRIPTS=1 go test ./cmd/vens/... -run TestScript/generate_trivy_golden
# to regenerate the golden file

exec vens generate --llm=mock --config-file=config.yaml --sbom-serial-number=urn:uuid:aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee report.json output.cdx.json
stderr 'Processing vulnerabilities'

# Verify output structure
exists output.cdx.json
json-contains output.cdx.json '"bomFormat": "CycloneDX"'
json-contains output.cdx.json '"specVersion": "1.6"'
json-contains output.cdx.json 'CVE-2024-5678'
json-contains output.cdx.json '"name": "NVD"'

-- config.yaml --
project:
  name: "golden-test"
  description: "Test for golden file comparison"
context:
  exposure: "internet"
  data_sensitivity: "high"
  business_criticality: "critical"
-- report.json --
{
  "SchemaVersion": 2,
  "CreatedAt": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
  "ArtifactName": "test-image:1.0",
  "ArtifactType": "container_image",
  "Results": [
    {
      "Target": "test-image:1.0",
      "Class": "os-pkgs",
      "Type": "debian",
      "Vulnerabilities": [
        {
          "VulnerabilityID": "CVE-2024-5678",
          "PkgID": "libcurl@7.88.1-10",
          "PkgName": "libcurl",
          "PkgIdentifier": {
            "PURL": "pkg:deb/debian/libcurl@7.88.1-10?arch=amd64"
          },
          "InstalledVersion": "7.88.1-10",
          "FixedVersion": "7.88.1-11",
          "Status": "fixed",
          "Title": "libcurl buffer overflow",
          "Description": "A buffer overflow in libcurl.",
          "Severity": "CRITICAL",
          "DataSource": {
            "ID": "debian",
            "Name": "Debian Security Tracker",
            "URL": "https://security-tracker.debian.org/tracker/CVE-2024-5678"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
